commit.subject: LU-19066 obdfilter: Create a failure_domain file
commit.message:
LU-19066 obdfilter: Create a failure_domain file

Create a file on the OST for storing the failure-domain field.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Ronnie Sahlberg <rsahlberg@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I61f0ea93ae9c52352a49c65b8116b6f53e9f093e
Was-Change-Id: I7a45f99d3f6719b1984ec1ada38a4b6874665004
